Isekai Shoukan Ojisan no Juu Musou Life: Survival Game-zuki Salaryman wa Kaisha Owari ni Isekai e Chokki Suru
synopsis: The middle-aged man and airsoft enthusiast Daisuke Koga is summoned to a different world on his 40th birthday. Given the ability to turn airsoft guns into real guns, Daisuke must save the other world while traveling back and forth between reality and the fantasy world. Alongside female swordsman Rena, Daisuke becomes the only gun user and dominates in the fantasy world after work! (Source: Houbunsha, translated)

title: If the Villainess and Villain Met and Fell in Love
titleRomaji: Akuyaku Reijou to Akuyaku Reisoku ga, Deatte Koi ni Ochita Nara: Nanashi no Seirei to Keiyakushite Oidasareta Reijou wa, Kyou mo Reisoku to Kisoiatteiru Youdesu
titleEnglish: If the Villainess and Villain Met and Fell in Love
titleNative: 悪役令嬢と悪役令息が、出逢って恋に落ちたなら　～名無しの精霊と契約して追い出された令嬢は、今日も令息と競い合っているようです～
synonyms: If the Villainess and Villain Met and Fell in Love

synopsis: Contracted with a no-name spirit, Brigitte Meidell is a disappointment to her noble family and the mockery of her peers at the Otoleanna Academy of Magic—except for one. Yuri Aurealis is intelligent, handsome…and oh so arrogant. He’s made enemies of the same people as Brigitte, meaning the two should get along just fine. However, his boorishness accidentally sparks a rivalry between them. It’s a competition that has the potential to bring the two closer than they ever thought…! (Source: Yen Press)

synopsis: With their nations in conflict, the Hero Reid and the Sage Elria had long been on opposing sides of the battlefield. However, it would all come to a much too sudden end with the Sage's passing. Single-handedly breaking through the enemy ranks to see Elria one last time, Reid meets his own heroic demise... But then, he opens his eyes as a newborn a thousand years later, getting another chance at life…and love?! (Source: Manga UP! Global)

synopsis: The Sage Dwight along with the Hero defeated the Demon Lord who plunged the world into darkness. However, they were falsely accused of becoming the next Demon Lords because of their power, and were thrown to the Death Valley to die… Although his flesh had rotten away, he lived on as a skeleton because of his grudge against the world. Dwight has vowed to turn against that broken world, and with a power that surpasses even the former Demon King, and by leading countless Skeletons he's going to start an all out war…! (Source: Comikey)

titleRomaji: S-Kyuu Boukensha ga Ayumu Michi: Tsuihou Sareta Shounen wa Shin no Nouryoku 'Buki Master' de Sekai Saikyou ni Itaru
titleNative: Ｓ級冒険者が歩む道　～追放された少年は真の能力『武器マスター』で世界最強に至る～
synopsis: Haise is a young boy who has been gifted with an unknown ability. He becomes an adventurer together with his childhood friend Sasha, but is kicked out of the team for being unable to use his ability and being a hindrance. Furthermore, while continuing his solo adventure, he is caught in a trap and falls into dire straits. Just as he is on the brink of death, Haise's ability "Weapon Master" awakens! It is a power that shakes the laws of the world, summoning weapons from another world!? An unrivaled fantasy set in another world that begins with adversity! (Source: SB Creative, translated)
chapterSourceTitle: S-Kyuu Boukensha ga Ayumu Michi - Tsuihou Sareta Shounen wa Shin no Nouryoku "Buki Master" de Sekai Saikyou ni Itaru

synopsis: Starting his second year of high school, Ren Tabata was determined to get over his loner past and make some new friends. The first person he approached was the girl next to him, Touko Sasaki, who seemed gloomy and a little intimidating at first, but he couldn't seem to take his eyes off her. A romantic comedy between two shy but cute people who don't want to be alone anymore! (Source: DoraDora Sharp#, translated)

title: Transformers Legends
titleRomaji: Transformers Legends
titleNative: トランスフォーマーレジェンズ
synopsis: Starting off as 4koma and published online to promote the titular Transformers Legends toyline, with special Bonus Edition (出張版 Shutchōban) chapters of the comic packed with the toys themselves, it Initially showcased the misadventures of the Beast Wars cast re-imagined as adult Transformers fans, before eventually taking a more story-driven approach and attempting to connect all the entries of the Japanese Generation 1 anime and manga continuity into one storyline. Heavily marketed towards adult collectors and otaku in the face of the brand's dwindling popularity with children after TakaraTomy's largely unsuccessful first attempt in the mid-2000s, it attempted to change the image of the Transformers franchise, with much more "adult", often ecchi-filled humour and numerous references to fan culture. Ulltimately concluded when TakaraTomy began a brand unification with Hasbro starting with Power of the Primes, deciding to mainly sell Hasbro toys as is with minimal changes to packaging. It was eventually succeeded by the more action-oriented Generations Selects Special Comic promoting Hasbro and TakaraTomy's joint Generations Selects imprint. (Source: TFwiki, edited)

synopsis: Net is a young man whose true skill lies in his large personal connections, which has allowed him to achieve great feats from behind the scenes. One day, however, his own king runs out of patience with him, and banishes him from the legendary heroes' party. Now he has to start again as an adventurer, though he plans to make full use of his connections with powerful knightly orders and other races.

A Boy Who Has Been Reincarnated Twice Spends Peacefully as an S-Rank Adventurer, ~ I who was a Sage and a Hero of Previous World, Will Live in Peacefullness in the Next World~
synopsis: "I was reincarnated again." Rex, a reincarnated boy with two past lives—a "Sage" and a "Hero." Having learned the dangers of standing out from the memories of those lives, he vows to live a simple third life as an "Adventurer." But that "simple" was way too "fancy" for normal people!! So begins the exciting fantasy adventure drama of the strongest boy with no self-awareness, overwhelming the people around him in his super new game plus!! (Source: MANGA UP!)

The only one trying to contain her antics is Ren Nagakura, the class committee chairman; but Ren, despite being the class chairman, is also little clueless about other people (i.e. she's an idiot). And with Ren's involvement, Sai's weird experiments always turn out even weirder... Note: Includes 5 extra chapters.

titleNative: 残響
synonyms: Reverberation
Resonance
Détonations
synopsis: Satoru spends his days listlessly in a factory town. The old man Segawa, a former Yakuza, lives in the room next to his cheap apartment. One day, Segawa tells Satoru, "I'll give you 5 million yen to put me out of my misery". Satoru hesitates, and Segawa sees through to the madness eating away inside him and begins to have a change of heart, and yet...!? A story of the filth of society and the dark path that Satoru takes, on the edge of sanity, with a gun and 5 million yen.

title: Mimi's Tales of Terror
titleRomaji: Mimi no Kaidan
titleNative: ミミの怪談
synonyms: Mimi's Ghost Stories
Contos de Horror da Mimi
Les cauchemars de Mimi
Las historias de fantasmas de Mimi
synopsis: University student Mimi and her boyfriend Naoto encounter one chilling mystery after another. There’s the enigmatic neighbor woman dressed in black from head to toe—but if she’s so odd, why does it seems like there are many others like her? Then, whose eyes track Mimi’s movements from the cemetery next door? And why does a bizarre red circle drawn on a basement wall change with each passing day? Nine scary stories that really happened, drawn from the famed collection of urban legends Shin Mimibukuro (New Earmuffs), and adapted into manga by horror genius Junji Ito! Chapter 1: On the Utility Pole Chapter 2: The Woman Next Door Chapter 3: Rustling in the Grass Chapter 4: Grave Placement Chapter 5: Seashore Chapter 6: Just the Two of Us Chapter 7: Scarlet Circle Chapter 8: Sign in the Field Chapter 9: Monster Prop (Source: VIZ Media)

title: Peddler in Another World: I Can Go Back to My World Whenever I Want
titleRomaji: Itsudemo Jitaku ni Kaerareru Ore wa, Isekai de Gyoushounin wo Hajimemashita
titleEnglish: Peddler in Another World: I Can Go Back to My World Whenever I Want
titleNative: いつでも自宅に帰れる俺は、異世界で行商人をはじめました
synopsis: After quitting his job at a toxic company, Shiro Amata moves into the house his grandmother left him in her will. There, he soon makes two life-changing discoveries: one, his grandmother was really a witch from another world, and two, said other world is just on the other side of her closet door! Thanks to a book she left for Shiro, he also manages to obtain an all-powerful skill called “Equivalent Exchange,” which allows him to turn money from his world into otherworldly currency and vice versa. With this, Shiro decides to set up shop and sell convenient items like matches to the colorful inhabitants of the other world. His plan: make a massive profit on the goods he brings from home to become so rich that he never needs another job ever again! Based on the light novel of the same name. (Source: j-novel club)

synopsis: Rintaro Shido, a high school boy who aspires to become a full-time house-husband, is in the same class with Rei Otosaki, a popular and well-known idol. The two have no relationship other than being classmates, but that changes drastically when Rintaro serves Rei a home-cooked meal after she nearly collapses from hunger! The food was so delicious that Rei asks him, "Can I come and eat with you every day?" (Source: Comic Gardo, translated)

title: Sensei, Kongetsu Dou desu ka
titleRomaji: Sensei, Kongetsu Dou desu ka
titleNative: 先生、今月どうですか
synonyms: 老師, 這個月可以嗎
老師，這個月狀況如何?
synopsis: Murasaki has the power to see the future of the person she touches. As the landlord's daughter, she has to chase after Shijima Banri for rent every month. Every time, the poor author Shijima promises her that he'll pay rent as soon as he gets published and gets paid. Murasaki quietly supports his work, because she can see that Shijima is the person she is fated to marry. Note: Chapter count includes three extra chapters.
